faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is an SEO audit and how can it help my store?
faq.a1: An SEO audit is a comprehensive health check for your website, analyzing 30+ key signals including page titles, meta descriptions, H1 tags, page load speed, mobile-friendliness, image optimization, and hreflang international tags. The report identifies issues blocking search engine crawling and rankings, with actionable recommendations to help your Shopify or WordPress store rank higher on Google and Bing — driving more organic traffic and sales.
faq.q2: What's the difference between the free and paid tiers?
faq.a2: The free tier gives you 3 audits per day with a full online score report covering all 30+ checks and recommendations, instantly. The paid report ($9.99) additionally includes a professional bilingual PDF (English + Chinese) with a complete score breakdown, priority fix checklist, and platform-specific recommendations — perfect for sharing with your developer or SEO consultant to streamline communication and execution.
faq.q3: Which platforms do you support? Are Shopify and WordPress audits different?
faq.a3: We support any HTTP/HTTPS website, including Shopify, WordPress, Wix, Squarespace, and custom builds. The system auto-detects your platform and provides platform-specific tips: Shopify owners get recommendations on theme SEO settings and product page optimization; WordPress users receive guidance on Yoast SEO plugin setup, Elementor optimization, and WooCommerce product page best practices.
faq.q4: What is GEO optimization and why does it matter for cross-border sellers?
faq.a4: GEO (Geographic SEO) optimization covers hreflang multilingual tags, geo.region meta tags, multi-currency signals, and LocalBusiness structured data — all designed for cross-border e-commerce. Correct GEO signals tell search engines your target markets, helping your products appear in the right country-specific search results, which is especially important for Chinese sellers targeting US, UK, and Australian markets.
faq.q5: How long does an audit take? Will it affect my website?
faq.a5: Most audits complete within 30 seconds; complex sites may take up to 60 seconds. Our analysis is completely read-only — we only fetch publicly accessible pages. It will not affect your website, database, or server in any way, and requires no plugin installation or admin access.
faq.q6: How often should I re-audit? How long are results valid?
faq.a6: Audit results are cached for 24 hours. If you've fixed issues and want to verify immediately, click the "Re-audit" button on your results page — it bypasses the cache, fetches the latest data, and does not count against your daily free limit. We recommend re-auditing after any major site update, or doing a monthly check-in to track your SEO health trends.
